mako.raw:
{"query":"SAG-AFTRA Nickelodeon agreement May 2025 ratification vote results voice actor contract terms","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1571,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/sag-aftra-national-board-approves-interactive-media-agreement","title":"SAG-AFTRA National Board Approves Interactive Media Agreement","content":"Today, the Screen Actors Guild-American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (SAG-AFTRA) National Board approved the tentative agreement with the video game bargaining group on terms for the Interactive Media Agreement.
If ratified, the agreement would provide compounded increases in performer compensation at a rate of 15.17% upon ratification plus additional 3% increases in Nov.
The health && retirement contribution rates to the SAG-AFTRA Health Plan will be raised from 16.5% to 17% upon ratification and to 17.5% in Oct.
The new contract accomplishes important guardrails and gains around A.I., including the requirement of informed consent across various A.I. uses and the ability for performers to suspend informed consent for Digital Replica use during a strike.
The full terms of the three-year deal will be released with the ratification materials onWednesday, June 18.
A tentative agreement was reached with the video game employers on June 9 and the strike was officially suspended on June 11.
Eligible SAG-AFTRA members will have until 5 p.m.
PDT on Wednesday, July 9, 2025 to cast their vote on ratification.
SAG-AFTRA members are the faces and voices that entertain and inform America and the world.
A proud affiliate of the AFL-CIO, SAG-AFTRA has national offices in Los Angeles and New York and local offices nationwide representing members working together to secure the strongest protections for entertainment and media artists into the 21st century and beyond."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"SAG-AFTRA Nickelodeon agreement May 2025 ratification vote results voice actor contract terms","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://kidscreen.com/2025/05/08/nickelodeon-and-sag-aftra-draft-up-a-tentative-contract","title":"Kidscreen » Archive » Nickelodeon and SAG-AFTRA draft up a tentative contract","content":"# Nickelodeon and SAG-AFTRA draft up a tentative contract. ##### The terms include pay raises worth more than US$3.25 million, increased rates for interstitials, dub residuals for voice actors, and several AI protections. Nickelodeon and SAG-AFTRA have reached a tentative agreement on a new three-year contract that will govern the involvement of Guild actors in animated programming produced for Nick’s cable channels and Paramount+. Some highlights in this new Nickelodeon Animation Agreement include pay increases worth more than US$3.25 million, higher rates for interstitials, and protections against AI. It also incorporates some of the gains SAG-AFTRA achieved in an updated Television Animation Agreement Made For New Media that went into effect in 2023, such as SVOD residual improvements and a success bonus. As a next step, SAG-AFTRA will now send the Nickelodeon Animation Agreement to its National Board for review and ratification. Nickelodeon, Nickelodeon Animation Agreement, SAG-AFTRA, unions, voice actors.","score":0.8338803,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/gaming/news/video-game-actors-strike-contract-ratified-sag-aftra-1236451291","title":"Video Game Actors Contract Ratified: SAG-AFTRA Leaders ...","content":"# Video Game Actors Contract Ratified: SAG-AFTRA Leaders Talk Gaming Execs’ Reckoning With Hollywood’s AI Standards, 11-Month Strike’s Turning Point. Following an 11-month strike plagued by back-and-forth disputes over Generative AI, SAG-AFTRA has ratified its new contract with major video game companies including Activision, Disney Character Voices, Electronic Arts, Epic Games, Formosa Interactive, Insomniac Games, Take 2 Productions and WB Games Inc. Per a joint statement issued by the actors union and the video game companies party to the agreement Wednesday, SAG-AFTRA members approved the 2025 SAG-AFTRA Interactive Media Agreement by a vote of 95.04% to 4.96%. Now, nearly a month out from the strike’s end when a tentative deal was reached June 11, Crabtree-Ireland says: “I do expect that the terms that are part of the deal they intend to fulfill and so I do think that, from my point of view, that leaves them feeling like they have now sort of closed that circle, or closed the loop with the other companies in the entertainment and media states who have agreed to terms that address the core elements of informed consent and fair compensation.”.","score":0.7872945,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/sag-aftra-ai-bargaining-and-policy-work-timeline","title":"SAG-AFTRA A.I.
